category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Cambodia) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Cambodia Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入柬埔寨：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入柬埔寨：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Cambodian requirements: Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) CS standards and conformity/import inspection, CS/IEC 62133 cell safety, TRC type approval for wireless functions, UN 38.3 transport, and the in-country importer of record. Cambodia generally adopts IEC and ASEAN standards and does not yet operate an EU-style horizontal battery, RoHS, or producer-responsibility regime.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源合规文件与柬埔寨要求对照：柬埔寨标准局（ISC）CS标准与合格评定/进口检验、CS/IEC 62133电芯安全、TRC无线功能型号核准、UN 38.3运输，以及境内进口商主体。柬埔寨总体采用IEC及东盟标准，目前尚无欧盟式横向电池、RoHS或生产者责任制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源合規文件與柬埔寨要求對照：柬埔寨標準局（ISC）CS標準與合格評定/進口檢驗、CS/IEC 62133電芯安全、TRC無線功能型號核准、UN 38.3運輸，以及境內進口商主體。柬埔寨總體採用IEC及東盟標準，目前尚無歐盟式橫向電池、RoHS或生產者責任制度。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规随时变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規隨時變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium battery and power bank exporters to Cambodia should align with the Institute of Standards of Cambodia (ISC) conformity and import-inspection regime, build evidence to CS/IEC 62133 cell safety, obtain TRC type approval for any wireless function, complete UN 38.3 transport testing, and appoint an in-country importer of record. Cambodia largely adopts IEC and ASEAN standards and has no EU-style battery, RoHS, or producer-responsibility regime, so Chinese GB 31241 testing supports engineering analysis but is not by itself an ISC market-access approval.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池及移动电源出口柬埔寨，应对接柬埔寨标准局（ISC）的合格评定与进口检验制度，围绕CS/IEC 62133电芯安全建立证据，为任何无线功能取得TRC型号核准，完成UN 38.3运输测试，并指定境内进口商主体。柬埔寨主要采用IEC及东盟标准，尚无欧盟式电池、RoHS或生产者责任制度，因此中国GB 31241测试可支持工程分析，但本身不构成ISC市场准入批准。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池及行動電源出口柬埔寨，應對接柬埔寨標準局（ISC）的合格評定與進口檢驗制度，圍繞CS/IEC 62133電芯安全建立證據，為任何無線功能取得TRC型號核准，完成UN 38.3運輸測試，並指定境內進口商主體。柬埔寨主要採用IEC及東盟標準，尚無歐盟式電池、RoHS或生產者責任制度，因此中國GB 31241測試可支持工程分析，但本身不構成ISC市場准入批准。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator, standards body, or primary legal source preferred.
